evals.prompt: 请审查这份购销合同，我是买方（甲方/需方），找出所有风险点并按风险等级排列。

must_include: 免责条款排除直接损失

assertions.name: has_overview_table
assertions.description: Output contains a risk overview table with columns for 审查维度, 风险等级, 问题简述, 条款位置

assertions.name: min_findings_15
assertions.description: At least 15 risk findings are reported

assertions.name: severe_exclusion_of_direct_loss
assertions.description: Finds the clause excluding direct losses (免责排除直接损失) as 严重 risk

assertions.name: important_penalty_cap_zero
assertions.description: Finds the 0% penalty cap (违约金上限0%) as 重要 or 严重 risk

assertions.name: important_delivery_payment_linkage
assertions.description: Finds the delivery-payment linkage issue (交付-付款联动) as 重要 risk

assertions.name: important_short_inspection_period
assertions.description: Finds the 15-day inspection period as too short (验收期间偏短) as 重要 risk

assertions.name: finds_missing_party_info
assertions.description: Flags missing party information (主体信息缺失)

assertions.name: finds_vague_warranty_start
assertions.description: Flags the vague warranty start date (质保期起算不明)

assertions.name: table_sorted_by_risk
assertions.description: Overview table rows are sorted by risk level (严重 first)

assertions.name: no_vague_suggestions
assertions.description: No findings use banned vague phrases like '建议完善' without concrete revision

assertions.name: waits_for_drill_down
assertions.description: Output ends by asking user which dimension to drill into

assertions.name: distinguishes_blank_from_defect
assertions.description: Does not flag unfilled template blanks as 严重/重要 structural risks

evals.prompt: 审查这份合同，我是采购方（需方/甲方），给出完整审查报告。

assertions.name: has_overview_table
assertions.description: Output contains a risk overview table with columns for 审查维度, 风险等级, 问题简述, 条款位置

assertions.name: min_findings_12
assertions.description: At least 12 risk findings are reported

assertions.name: severe_blank_objection_period
assertions.description: Finds the blank objection period (异议期限空白) as 严重 risk

assertions.name: important_blank_subject_matter
assertions.description: Finds blank subject matter info (标的物信息空白) as 重要 risk

assertions.name: important_vague_payment_terms
assertions.description: Finds vague payment terms (付款条件模糊) as 重要 risk

assertions.name: important_blank_delivery_date
assertions.description: Finds blank delivery date (交货日期空白) as 重要 risk

assertions.name: finds_hazardous_chem_compliance
assertions.description: Flags hazardous chemical compliance issues (危化品合规)

assertions.name: finds_missing_party_info
assertions.description: Flags missing party information (主体信息缺失)

assertions.name: table_sorted_by_risk
assertions.description: Overview table rows are sorted by risk level (严重 first)

assertions.name: no_vague_suggestions
assertions.description: No findings use banned vague phrases like '建议完善' without concrete revision

assertions.name: waits_for_drill_down
assertions.description: Output ends by asking user which dimension to drill into

assertions.name: distinguishes_blank_from_defect
assertions.description: Does not flag unfilled template blanks as 严重/重要 structural risks — distinguishes form blanks from clause gaps

success_criteria.trigger_rate: Skill activates when contract file + review intent is present (target: ≥90%)
success_criteria.false_trigger_rate: Skill does NOT activate for non-contract text (target: ≤10%)
success_criteria.precision: Fraction of reported risks that are valid (target: ≥75%)
success_criteria.format_compliance: Output matches required table + drill-down structure (target: 100%)
success_criteria.cross_session_consistency: Same contract + same prompt produces same core findings across sessions (target: ≥90%)
